TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Cung-ku-an-huy_takuliyaway_a_buyu‚Äô, title = Cung-ku-an-huy_takuliyaway_a_buyu‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cung-ku-an-huy_takuliyaway_a_buyu‚Äô} }

S.FORM: šł≠ŚúčŚģČŚĺĹÁúĀťĽÉŚĪĪ Cung-ku-an-huy takuliyaway a buyu'takuliyaway a buyu' itini I cung-ku nu an-huy, i nu timilan, u timul atua mis u tanayu' nida makaala tu sipsep ku-ki katanayu', u amisan atu tipan nu ahebal sa lusep a ku-li ku ahebal, u buyu' nu ahebal caytu malebut ku ku-li u tatelunagan nuytiniay a baetu sa u huwa-kang-in ani kasa kaku, satalakaway i lin-huwa a tunguduh nu buyu'buyu'an. takuliyaway a buyu, nu sayaway a ngangan sa kapahay a kitidaan, u aalaan tu sapilacul, u sibalucu'ay hidan u sipayaay ku patahekal tu ngangan . nayi 1982 a mihcaan maala nu sayaway maala nu kanatal tatelungan nu aidangan ; 1986 a mihcaan talukiyawaw a buyu' mala nu cung-ku caysep a aaidanga nu cacay, u cung-ku caysep nu masacacayay u buyu'buyu'an aaidangan, 1990 amihcaan 12abulad u takuliyaway a buyu' aaidangan sa mala nuytiniay a lalangawan atu celak sananay tu a nisubelid nu paudipay a zaysang kyu maala tu pulung nu kanatal sapasubana' a masakaputay mapacumud I kitakit nu masubeliday a zaysang, i 2004 amihcaan micumud tu kitakit u kapahay a lala nu aaidangan. 2015 amihcaan mala nu kitakit tahekal sananay a sasokulan a mapulungay nu sayaway a sakapahay hekal sananay a sasililan tu sumilaway a kakitidaan. naemekanś≠∑ŚŹ≤ huwang-san nu sumamad u yi-san han. idaw ku patucek misulit, u kakawsan nu cung-hu-wa-min-cu ci huwang-ti mukelid tu sitangahay a tademaw ci zung-ce-ce,hu-ciw-kung tayni tini i lin-tan, sadikuday sa kanamuhan nu paudipat mu tapabaw namin . takuliyaway a buyu pangangan han tu nubuyu nanum a kakakulitan nu sapinanuy. yu sumamad nu dikud nu min-mu nuayawan nu cin-mala nu takuliyaway a sapikulitan nu takuliyaway ku sapacuked nu sapikulit, neknek sa i takuliyaway, maybalucu ku sapitanam tu tatengaay a nukulitan, matucek kunipikulit tu takuliyaway a wayway nu aaidangan itini. u situngusay mala sisikiningay a tademaw ci may-cin se-taw cin-ciyang u singanganay kuheni tu namikulitay tu takuliyaway a lu nu sakasenengan a tademaw . ci se-taw hananay a tademaw sayaway cinida ya takuliyaway a buyu' pictu a katatibay nu buyubuyu'an mamin kulitan nida . dumasa u huwang-pi-hung udip ku patinekuay "takuliyawa a buyu' nu buyu'ay atademaw". nu mukasi katukuh ayda katuuday a misulitay a tademaw yadahtu kunisulitan nu heni tu sakay takuliyaway a patineku , itini i takuliyaway a buyu' mamin ku mu-yay a baetu sulitan mahida u takuliyawaw a buyu' idaw ku lalangawan . aaidangaśôĮŚćÄ mikacaw tu liw-lung paengaw tu sin-ciyaw-sa-yi a katadungduh nu buyubuyu'an nu kasienawan katahekalan nu cilal ina takuliyaway a buyubuyu'an sa idaw ku kuwanay a wiy-yub-huy, umikuwanay nu cu-zen wiytiniay a se-cang ku satungusay a mikuwan. u ahebal sa 160.6 a pin-huwang-kuli, matatulaka tu unsing ladem nu buyu' ,katatihepa nu buyu', amisan a bayu' ,u kilakilangan, sangaw, minabaway a sauwac, u kalalikeluh a banaw, u hu-ku a siw nu mikuwanay, atu takuliyaway a buyubuyu'an micapi tu limaay a tukay atu cacay ku kitidaan " takuliyawa a kitidaan tang-ku-cen, tan -ciya-ciyaw ce, san-ku- cen, keng-cen-cen, ciyaw-cun-cen, atu yang-hu-lin-cang".ťĚĘÁ©ćÁīĄ160.6 . tini idaw ku limsep ku-li tanayu'ay a caculilan, sapadadan tu midangay atu mikuliay sapaculil tu henian a micaliway. u maminay aaidangan sa atu kitidaan mabi' atu sapalabang sa lalabinan sat u labang, katuuday a midangay sa u culil tabuyu', alahican katukuh nuycuwaan a katatihepa nu buyubuyu'an milabin muhalhal tu nikatahekal nu kanihalan, saka tu ademiad sa duma tu adadan tasasa. u takuliyaway a buyu' mala nu cung-ku nu kanatal aaidangan mala saka 5A a katatibay nu aaidangan nu kitidaan. 5AÁīöśóÖťĀäśôĮŚćÄ. u mikuwanay sisikining amusikul tu aaidangan, mitadasmikiyaku, misakapah a miliyung . mikuwanay namakayni nu kin-sihu misulul apatideng tu hulic sapikuwan a masakaputay, u masakaputay kaph micukaymas tu nu hulic sapibaking . namakayni I takuliyaway a aidangan 2018 amihcaan 11 a bulad pakatineng "takuliyaway a aaidangan tayniay midang u wayway idaw ku sapikuwan nu hulic" u midanga nu tayniay a labang sa idaw kuni pikuwan tu sumanahay lumeniay a hulic, ngy idaw ku sapikuwan tu wayway nu tayniay a labang. . anu mala lumeniay tu a labang sa, a papulungen tu "takuliyaway u cayay kanamuhi a tademaw", pataydan icalacay "pakatineng tu katuuday" "ŚÖ¨ŚĮ©".
S.PHON: ******* ¶uŇč-ku-an-ńßuj takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ °takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ ° itini i ¶uŇč-ku nu an-ńßuj, i nu timir~…ĺan, u timur~…ĺ atua mis u tanaju Ē~ ° nida makaar~…ĺa tu sips…ôp ku-ki katanaju Ē~ °, u amisan atu tipan nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa r~…ĺus…ôp a ku-r~…ĺi ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺ, u buju Ē~ ° nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ¶ajtu mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku ku-r~…ĺi u tat…ôr~…ĺunagan nujtiniaj a ba…ôtu sa u ńßuwa-kaŇč-in ani kasa kaku, satar~…ĺakawaj i r~…ĺin-ńßuwa a tuŇčuduńß nu buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an. takur~…ĺijawaj a buju, nu sajawaj a ŇčaŇčan sa kapańßaj a kitidaan, u aar~…ĺaan tu sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ, u sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj ńßidan u sipajaaj ku patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ŇčaŇčan . naji **** a mińß ¶aan maar~…ĺa nu sajawaj maar~…ĺa nu kanatar~…ĺ tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu aidaŇčan ; **** a mińß ¶aan tar~…ĺukijawaw a buju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa nu ¶uŇč-ku ¶ajs…ôp a aaidaŇča nu ¶a ¶aj, u ¶uŇč-ku ¶ajs…ôp nu masa ¶a ¶ajaj u buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an aaidaŇčan, **** amińß ¶aan **abur~…ĺad u takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ ° aaidaŇčan sa mar~…ĺa nujtiniaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu ¶…ôr~…ĺak sananaj tu a nisub…ôr~…ĺid nu paudipaj a zajsaŇč kju maar~…ĺa tu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ sapasubana Ē~ ° a masakaputaj mapa ¶umud i kitakit nu masub…ôr~…ĺidaj a zajsaŇč, i **** amińß ¶aan mi ¶umud tu kitakit u kapańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa nu aaidaŇčan. **** amińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa nu kitakit tańß…ôkar~…ĺ sananaj a sasokur~…ĺan a mapur~…ĺuŇčaj nu sajawaj a sakapańßaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sananaj a sasir~…ĺir~…ĺan tu sumir~…ĺawaj a kakitidaan. na…ôm…ôkan** ńßuwaŇč-san nu sumamad u ji-san ńßan. idaw ku patu ¶…ôk misur~…ĺit, u kakawsan nu ¶uŇč-ńßu-wa-min- ¶u ¶i ńßuwaŇč-ti muk…ôr~…ĺid tu sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw ¶i zuŇč- ¶…ô- ¶…ô,ńßu- ¶iw-kuŇč tajni tini i r~…ĺin-tan, sadikudaj sa kanamuńßan nu paudipat mu tapabaw namin . takur~…ĺijawaj a buju paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu nubuju nanum a kakakur~…ĺitan nu sapinanuj. ju sumamad nu dikud nu min-mu nuajawan nu ¶in-mar~…ĺa nu takur~…ĺijawaj a sapikur~…ĺitan nu takur~…ĺijawaj ku sapa ¶uk…ôd nu sapikur~…ĺit, n…ôkn…ôk sa i takur~…ĺijawaj, majbar~…ĺu ¶u ku sapitanam tu tat…ôŇčaaj a nukur~…ĺitan, matu ¶…ôk kunipikur~…ĺit tu takur~…ĺijawaj a wajwaj nu aaidaŇčan itini. u situŇčusaj mar~…ĺa sisikiniŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i maj- ¶in s…ô-taw ¶in- ¶ijaŇč u siŇčaŇčanaj kuńß…ôni tu namikur~…ĺitaj tu takur~…ĺijawaj a r~…ĺu nu sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw . ¶i s…ô-taw ńßananaj a tad…ômaw sajawaj ¶inida ja takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ ° pi ¶tu a katatibaj nu bujubuju Ē~ °an mamin kur~…ĺitan nida . dumasa u ńßuwaŇč-pi-ńßuŇč udip ku patin…ôkuaj "takur~…ĺijawa a buju Ē~ ° nu buju Ē~ °aj atad…ômaw". nu mukasi katukuńß ajda katuudaj a misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw jadańßtu kunisur~…ĺitan nu ńß…ôni tu sakaj takur~…ĺijawaj a patin…ôku , itini i takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ ° mamin ku mu-jaj a ba…ôtu sur~…ĺitan mańßida u takur~…ĺijawaw a buju Ē~ ° idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan . aaidaŇča** mika ¶aw tu r~…ĺiw-r~…ĺuŇč pa…ôŇčaw tu sin- ¶ijaw-sa-ji a kataduŇčduńß nu bujubuju Ē~ °an nu kasi…ônawan katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ina takur~…ĺijawaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an sa idaw ku kuwanaj a wij-jub-ńßuj, umikuwanaj nu ¶u-z…ôn wijtiniaj a s…ô- ¶aŇč ku satuŇčusaj a mikuwan. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa ***.* a pin-ńßuwaŇč-kur~…ĺi, matatur~…ĺaka tu unsiŇč r~…ĺad…ôm nu buju Ē~ ° ,katatińß…ôpa nu buju Ē~ °, amisan a baju Ē~ ° ,u kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, saŇčaw, minabawaj a sauwa ¶, u kar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß a banaw, u ńßu-ku a siw nu mikuwanaj, atu takur~…ĺijawaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an mi ¶api tu r~…ĺimaaj a tukaj atu ¶a ¶aj ku kitidaan " takur~…ĺijawa a kitidaan taŇč-ku- ¶…ôn, tan - ¶ija- ¶ijaw ¶…ô, san-ku- ¶…ôn, k…ôŇč- ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn, ¶ijaw- ¶un- ¶…ôn, atu jaŇč-ńßu-r~…ĺin- ¶aŇč".******.* . tini idaw ku r~…ĺims…ôp ku-r~…ĺi tanaju Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, sapadadan tu midaŇčaj atu mikur~…ĺiaj sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu ńß…ônian a mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj. u maminaj aaidaŇčan sa atu kitidaan mabi Ē~ ° atu sapar~…ĺabaŇč sa r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan sat u r~…ĺabaŇč, katuudaj a midaŇčaj sa u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tabuju Ē~ °, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an katukuńß nuj ¶uwaan a katatińß…ôpa nu bujubuju Ē~ °an mir~…ĺabin muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kanińßar~…ĺan, saka tu ad…ômiad sa duma tu adadan tasasa. u takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa nu ¶uŇč-ku nu kanatar~…ĺ aaidaŇčan mar~…ĺa saka *a a katatibaj nu aaidaŇčan nu kitidaan. *a*****. u mikuwanaj sisikiniŇč amusikur~…ĺ tu aaidaŇčan, mitadasmikijaku, misakapańß a mir~…ĺijuŇč . mikuwanaj namakajni nu kin-sińßu misur~…ĺur~…ĺ apatid…ôŇč tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapikuwan a masakaputaj, u masakaputaj kapńß mi ¶ukajmas tu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapibakiŇč . namakajni i takur~…ĺijawaj a aidaŇčan **** amińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad pakatin…ôŇč "takur~…ĺijawaj a aaidaŇčan tajniaj midaŇč u wajwaj idaw ku sapikuwan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶" u midaŇča nu tajniaj a r~…ĺabaŇč sa idaw kuni pikuwan tu sumanańßaj r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, Ňčj idaw ku sapikuwan tu wajwaj nu tajniaj a r~…ĺabaŇč. . anu mar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôniaj tu a r~…ĺabaŇč sa, a papur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu "takur~…ĺijawaj u ¶ajaj kanamuńßi a tad…ômaw", patajdan i ¶ar~…ĺa ¶aj "pakatin…ôŇč tu katuudaj" "**".
S.FORM: šł≠ŚúčŚģČŚĺĹÁúĀťĽÉŚĪĪ Cung-ku-an-huy takuliyaway a buyu'takuliyaway a buyu' itini I cung-ku nu an-huy, i nu timilan, u timul atua mis u tanayu' nida makaala tu sipsep ku-ki katanayu', u amisan atu tipan nu ahebal sa lusep a ku-li ku ahebal, u buyu' nu ahebal caytu malebut ku ku-li u tatelunagan nuytiniay a baetu sa u huwa-kang-in ani kasa kaku, satalakaway i lin-huwa a tunguduh nu buyu'buyu'an. takuliyaway a buyu, nu sayaway a ngangan sa kapahay a kitidaan, u aalaan tu sapilacul, u sibalucu'ay hidan u sipayaay ku patahekal tu ngangan . nayi 1982 a mihcaan maala nu sayaway maala nu kanatal tatelungan nu aidangan ; 1986 a mihcaan talukiyawaw a buyu' mala nu cung-ku caysep a aaidanga nu cacay, u cung-ku caysep nu masacacayay u buyu'buyu'an aaidangan, 1990 amihcaan 12abulad u takuliyaway a buyu' aaidangan sa mala nuytiniay a lalangawan atu celak sananay tu a nisubelid nu paudipay a zaysang kyu maala tu pulung nu kanatal sapasubana' a masakaputay mapacumud I kitakit nu masubeliday a zaysang, i 2004 amihcaan micumud tu kitakit u kapahay a lala nu aaidangan. 2015 amihcaan mala nu kitakit tahekal sananay a sasokulan a mapulungay nu sayaway a sakapahay hekal sananay a sasililan tu sumilaway a kakitidaan. naemekanś≠∑ŚŹ≤ huwang-san nu sumamad u yi-san han. idaw ku patucek misulit, u kakawsan nu cung-hu-wa-min-cu ci huwang-ti mukelid tu sitangahay a tademaw ci zung-ce-ce,hu-ciw-kung tayni tini i lin-tan, sadikuday sa kanamuhan nu paudipat mu tapabaw namin . takuliyaway a buyu pangangan han tu nubuyu nanum a kakakulitan nu sapinanuy. yu sumamad nu dikud nu min-mu nuayawan nu cin-mala nu takuliyaway a sapikulitan nu takuliyaway ku sapacuked nu sapikulit, neknek sa i takuliyaway, maybalucu ku sapitanam tu tatengaay a nukulitan, matucek kunipikulit tu takuliyaway a wayway nu aaidangan itini. u situngusay mala sisikiningay a tademaw ci may-cin se-taw cin-ciyang u singanganay kuheni tu namikulitay tu takuliyaway a lu nu sakasenengan a tademaw . ci se-taw hananay a tademaw sayaway cinida ya takuliyaway a buyu' pictu a katatibay nu buyubuyu'an mamin kulitan nida . dumasa u huwang-pi-hung udip ku patinekuay "takuliyawa a buyu' nu buyu'ay atademaw". nu mukasi katukuh ayda katuuday a misulitay a tademaw yadahtu kunisulitan nu heni tu sakay takuliyaway a patineku , itini i takuliyaway a buyu' mamin ku mu-yay a baetu sulitan mahida u takuliyawaw a buyu' idaw ku lalangawan . aaidangaśôĮŚćÄ mikacaw tu liw-lung paengaw tu sin-ciyaw-sa-yi a katadungduh nu buyubuyu'an nu kasienawan katahekalan nu cilal ina takuliyaway a buyubuyu'an sa idaw ku kuwanay a wiy-yub-huy, umikuwanay nu cu-zen wiytiniay a se-cang ku satungusay a mikuwan. u ahebal sa 160.6 a pin-huwang-kuli, matatulaka tu unsing ladem nu buyu' ,katatihepa nu buyu', amisan a bayu' ,u kilakilangan, sangaw, minabaway a sauwac, u kalalikeluh a banaw, u hu-ku a siw nu mikuwanay, atu takuliyaway a buyubuyu'an micapi tu limaay a tukay atu cacay ku kitidaan " takuliyawa a kitidaan tang-ku-cen, tan -ciya-ciyaw ce, san-ku- cen, keng-cen-cen, ciyaw-cun-cen, atu yang-hu-lin-cang".ťĚĘÁ©ćÁīĄ160.6 . tini idaw ku limsep ku-li tanayu'ay a caculilan, sapadadan tu midangay atu mikuliay sapaculil tu henian a micaliway. u maminay aaidangan sa atu kitidaan mabi' atu sapalabang sa lalabinan sat u labang, katuuday a midangay sa u culil tabuyu', alahican katukuh nuycuwaan a katatihepa nu buyubuyu'an milabin muhalhal tu nikatahekal nu kanihalan, saka tu ademiad sa duma tu adadan tasasa. u takuliyaway a buyu' mala nu cung-ku nu kanatal aaidangan mala saka 5A a katatibay nu aaidangan nu kitidaan. 5AÁīöśóÖťĀäśôĮŚćÄ. u mikuwanay sisikining amusikul tu aaidangan, mitadasmikiyaku, misakapah a miliyung . mikuwanay namakayni nu kin-sihu misulul apatideng tu hulic sapikuwan a masakaputay, u masakaputay kaph micukaymas tu nu hulic sapibaking . namakayni I takuliyaway a aidangan 2018 amihcaan 11 a bulad pakatineng "takuliyaway a aaidangan tayniay midang u wayway idaw ku sapikuwan nu hulic" u midanga nu tayniay a labang sa idaw kuni pikuwan tu sumanahay lumeniay a hulic, ngy idaw ku sapikuwan tu wayway nu tayniay a labang. . anu mala lumeniay tu a labang sa, a papulungen tu "takuliyaway u cayay kanamuhi a tademaw", pataydan icalacay "pakatineng tu katuuday" "ŚÖ¨ŚĮ©".

masub…ôr~…ĺidaj a zajsaŇč, i **** amińß ¶aan mi ¶umud tu kitakit u kapańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa nu aaidaŇčan. **** amińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa nu kitakit tańß…ôkar~…ĺ sananaj a sasokur~…ĺan a mapur~…ĺuŇčaj nu sajawaj a sakapańßaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sananaj a sasir~…ĺir~…ĺan tu sumir~…ĺawaj a kakitidaan. na…ôm…ôkan** ńßuwaŇč-san nu sumamad u ji-san ńßan. idaw ku patu ¶…ôk misur~…ĺit, u kakawsan nu ¶uŇč-ńßu-wa-min- ¶u ¶i ńßuwaŇč-ti muk…ôr~…ĺid tu sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw ¶i zuŇč- ¶…ô- ¶…ô,ńßu- ¶iw-kuŇč tajni tini i r~…ĺin-tan, sadikudaj sa kanamuńßan nu paudipat mu tapabaw namin . takur~…ĺijawaj a buju paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu nubuju nanum a kakakur~…ĺitan nu sapinanuj. ju sumamad nu dikud nu min-mu nuajawan nu ¶in-mar~…ĺa nu takur~…ĺijawaj a sapikur~…ĺitan nu takur~…ĺijawaj ku sapa ¶uk…ôd nu sapikur~…ĺit, n…ôkn…ôk sa i takur~…ĺijawaj, majbar~…ĺu ¶u ku sapitanam tu tat…ôŇčaaj a nukur~…ĺitan, matu ¶…ôk kunipikur~…ĺit tu takur~…ĺijawaj a wajwaj nu aaidaŇčan itini. u situŇčusaj mar~…ĺa sisikiniŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i maj- ¶in s…ô-taw ¶in- ¶ijaŇč u siŇčaŇčanaj kuńß…ôni tu namikur~…ĺitaj tu takur~…ĺijawaj a r~…ĺu nu sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw . ¶i s…ô-taw ńßananaj a tad…ômaw sajawaj ¶inida ja takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ ° pi ¶tu a katatibaj nu bujubuju Ē~ °an mamin kur~…ĺitan nida . dumasa u ńßuwaŇč-pi-ńßuŇč udip ku patin…ôkuaj "takur~…ĺijawa a buju Ē~ ° nu buju Ē~ °aj atad…ômaw". nu mukasi katukuńß ajda katuudaj a misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw jadańßtu kunisur~…ĺitan nu ńß…ôni tu sakaj takur~…ĺijawaj a patin…ôku , itini i takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ ° mamin ku mu-jaj a ba…ôtu sur~…ĺitan mańßida u takur~…ĺijawaw a buju Ē~ ° idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan . aaidaŇča** mika ¶aw tu r~…ĺiw-r~…ĺuŇč pa…ôŇčaw tu sin- ¶ijaw-sa-ji a kataduŇčduńß nu bujubuju Ē~ °an nu kasi…ônawan katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ina takur~…ĺijawaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an sa idaw ku kuwanaj a wij-jub-ńßuj, umikuwanaj nu ¶u-z…ôn wijtiniaj a s…ô- ¶aŇč ku satuŇčusaj a mikuwan. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa ***.* a pin-ńßuwaŇč-kur~…ĺi, matatur~…ĺaka tu unsiŇč r~…ĺad…ôm nu buju Ē~ ° ,katatińß…ôpa nu buju Ē~ °, amisan a baju Ē~ ° ,u kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, saŇčaw, minabawaj a sauwa ¶, u kar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß a banaw, u ńßu-ku a siw nu mikuwanaj, atu takur~…ĺijawaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an mi ¶api tu r~…ĺimaaj a tukaj atu ¶a ¶aj ku kitidaan " takur~…ĺijawa a kitidaan taŇč-ku- ¶…ôn, tan - ¶ija- ¶ijaw ¶…ô, san-ku- ¶…ôn, k…ôŇč- ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn, ¶ijaw- ¶un- ¶…ôn, atu jaŇč-ńßu-r~…ĺin- ¶aŇč".******.* . tini idaw ku r~…ĺims…ôp ku-r~…ĺi tanaju Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, sapadadan tu midaŇčaj atu mikur~…ĺiaj sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu ńß…ônian a mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj. u maminaj aaidaŇčan sa atu kitidaan mabi Ē~ ° atu sapar~…ĺabaŇč sa r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan sat u r~…ĺabaŇč, katuudaj a midaŇčaj sa u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tabuju Ē~ °, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an katukuńß nuj ¶uwaan a katatińß…ôpa nu bujubuju Ē~ °an mir~…ĺabin muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kanińßar~…ĺan, saka tu ad…ômiad sa duma tu adadan tasasa. u takur~…ĺijawaj a buju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa nu ¶uŇč-ku nu kanatar~…ĺ aaidaŇčan mar~…ĺa saka *a a katatibaj nu aaidaŇčan nu kitidaan. *a*****. u mikuwanaj sisikiniŇč amusikur~…ĺ tu aaidaŇčan, mitadasmikijaku, misakapańß a mir~…ĺijuŇč . mikuwanaj namakajni nu kin-sińßu misur~…ĺur~…ĺ apatid…ôŇč tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapikuwan a masakaputaj, u masakaputaj kapńß mi ¶ukajmas tu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapibakiŇč . namakajni i takur~…ĺijawaj a aidaŇčan **** amińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad pakatin…ôŇč "takur~…ĺijawaj a aaidaŇčan tajniaj midaŇč u wajwaj idaw ku sapikuwan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶" u midaŇča nu tajniaj a r~…ĺabaŇč sa idaw kuni pikuwan tu sumanańßaj r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, Ňčj idaw ku sapikuwan tu wajwaj nu tajniaj a r~…ĺabaŇč. . anu mar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôniaj tu a r~…ĺabaŇč sa, a papur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu "takur~…ĺijawaj u ¶ajaj kanamuńßi a tad…ômaw", patajdan i ¶ar~…ĺa ¶aj "pakatin…ôŇč tu katuudaj" "**".
